overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in a leather coat and cowboy hat walking through a New Orleans-inspired historic district at night. The character moves from a narrow corridor through a courtyard and onto gas-lit streets lined with wrought iron balconies and blooming trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered corridor with wooden ceiling

events.description: exits narrow corridor through arched passage into open courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow corridor with reddish walls toward an arched opening

entered.detail: reddish plastered walls of the narrow passage
exposed wooden beams and planks overhead
stone archway leading to the courtyard ahead
single gas lamp illuminating the archway interior

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow enclosed corridor with reddish walls and a wooden beam ceiling. The character walks forward toward an arched stone passage illuminated by a hanging gas lamp, transitioning into an open courtyard area.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic courtyard with two-story balconies and potted plants

agents.ego_description: walking through the open courtyard surrounded by two-story buildings with white wooden balconies

entered.detail: historic building with white painted wooden balconies on upper floor
large potted palm plants arranged in the courtyard
white wooden exterior staircase leading to upper balcony

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide-open courtyard surrounded by historic two-story buildings featuring white wooden balconies. Potted palm trees and a stone fountain decorate the cobblestone ground as the character walks toward a doorway on the far side.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior corridor connecting courtyard to main street

events.description: enters a doorway from the courtyard into a narrow interior corridor
exits the corridor through an alleyway onto the main historic street

agents.ego_description: entering a doorway, walking through a narrow corridor past an NPC, then exiting to the street

notable_agents.action: man leaning against the corridor wall smoking a cigarette

entered.detail: weathered stone and plaster walls of the narrow passage
wall-mounted gas lantern providing warm light
tight alley walls leading to the street exit
ornate cast iron gas lamp post visible at the street exit

segments.scene_description: The character enters a doorway leading from the courtyard into a narrow interior corridor with weathered walls and a wall-mounted gas lantern. Passing an NPC smoking against the wall, the character continues through a tight alleyway and emerges onto a gas-lit historic street.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city street with wrought iron balconies and gas lighting

events.description: passes a parked horse-drawn carriage on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the gas-lit street lined with historic buildings and blooming trees

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage parked on the muddy street side

entered.detail: black wrought iron railings on second-floor balconies of brick buildings
painted wooden signs for various shops including a pharmacy
trees with pink and white blossoms lining the street
wooden barrels and crates stacked on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a historic city street illuminated by gas lamps, with two-story brick buildings featuring wrought iron balconies on the left. The street is lined with flowering trees and wooden barrels, and the character passes a parked horse-drawn carriage while walking on the cobblestone surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: continuing historic street with storefronts and posters

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past various storefronts and wooden crates

notable_agents.action: person standing on the sidewalk near the street edge

entered.detail: posters and advertisements plastered on the building walls
stacked wooden crates and debris on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking down the historic street, passing a millinery shop with visible signage and storefront posters on the walls. The wrought iron balconies are now closer on the left, and flowering trees line the right side of the muddy cobblestone street as the character approaches more wooden crates and debris.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined interior corridor into a wide courtyard and finally onto a gas-lit historic city street. It begins within a narrow passage of reddish walls and wooden beams, moving forward through an arched stone gateway into an open cobblestone courtyard surrounded by white wooden balconies and potted palms. As the character exits the courtyard through a doorway, the scene shifts back into a weathered interior corridor and a tight alleyway, passing a smoking figure before emerging into the open night air. The environment then expands into a wide street lined with brick buildings, wrought iron balconies, and flowering trees, where the camera passes a horse-drawn carriage. Finally, the path leads past a millinery shop and storefront posters, continuing along the muddy cobblestones toward wooden crates and debris.
